REMOVED FROM SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE CALENDAR SET FOR FEB-24-2012 - PER COURT ORDER. (525)

MASTER JURY CALENDAR SET FOR MAR-12-2012 CONTINUED TO MASTER CALENDAR JURY ON JUL-30-2012 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 206. JEREMY PASTERNAK APPEARING FOR PLAINTIFF. JOSEPH MICHAEL BREALL APPEARING FOR DEFENDANT. MR. PASTERNAK REQUESTED A CONTINUANCE OF THE TRIAL DATE DUE TO HIS CLEINT BEING ILL. THE COURT FINDS GOOD CAUSE TO CONTINUE THE TRIAL DATE. THE TRIAL DATE OF 3/12/12 IS CONTINUED TO 7/30/12 AT 9:30AM IN DEPT. 206 PER AGREEMENT OF PARTIES. NOTICE IS WAIVED BY BOTH PARTIES. JUDGE: KATHERINE FEINSTEIN; CLERK: R. VELUZ; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)
